# CWE-1289 negative: filename-only public asset lookup (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1289-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1289 mitigated: only a final filename component is accepted.

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

func FetchSharedAssetSafePure() http.HandlerFunc {
	root := "/srv/assets/public"
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		requested := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
		asset := filepath.Join(root, filepath.Base(requested))
		data, err := os.ReadFile(asset)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
			return
		}
		w.Write(data)
	}
}
